message:
refactor(wa): replace unsafe libc::kill with safe Command::new("kill")

Replace direct unsafe libc::kill() calls in the "wa stop" command with
safe std::process::Command invocations of the kill binary:

- SIGTERM: replace unsafe { libc::kill(pid, SIGTERM) } with
  Command::new("kill").args(["-s", "TERM", &pid.to_string()]).status()
  and match on the exit status for proper error reporting
- SIGKILL: same replacement for the force-kill path
- Use let-else pattern for check_running() result instead of match
  with manual exit, and remove unused LockMetadata import
- Improve error messages to include exit code on SIGTERM failure

This eliminates all unsafe blocks from the stop command while
maintaining identical behavior — the kill command binary performs
the same signal delivery with the same permission checks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
